name: equipo-de-agentes
description: > A research-grade deterministic orchestration and observability framework for multi-agent LLM systems operating under adversarial infrastructure constraints. > > This repository formalizes reproducible experimentation, resilience metrics, controlled degradation modeling, governance invariance, and deterministic evaluation in heterogeneous provider environments.

scripts.test: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_dof_sdk.py tests/test_governance.py tests/test_z3_gate.py tests/test_z3_verifier.py tests/test_tool_hooks.py tests/test_api.py tests/test_ast_verifier.py tests/test_loop_guard.py tests/test_execution_dag.py tests/test_merkle_tree.py
scripts.test:core: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_dof_sdk.py tests/test_governance.py tests/test_z3_gate.py tests/test_z3_verifier.py tests/test_tool_hooks.py tests/test_api.py tests/test_ast_verifier.py tests/test_loop_guard.py tests/test_execution_dag.py tests/test_merkle_tree.py
scripts.test:safe: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_dof_sdk.py tests/test_governance.py tests/test_z3_gate.py tests/test_z3_verifier.py tests/test_tool_hooks.py tests/test_api.py tests/test_ast_verifier.py tests/test_loop_guard.py tests/test_execution_dag.py tests/test_merkle_tree.py
